item.name: Fatter Cat Bugle
item.description: This horn emits a playful honk that calls a rotund-yet-sprightly feline to your side.

mount.name: Fatter Cat
mount.action: Summon your fatter cat─fatter than a fat cat, obviously.
mount.description: Seeing as how this pursy pussy can defy the very laws of physics by propelling itself high into the firmament, it is very likely that the creature is either a voidsent using a bloated cat's corpse as its corporeal vessel, or a deceased pet reanimated by one well versed in the necromantic arts.
mount.tooltip:
The entire city would be overrun
with large-testicled raccoon
dogs and flying rainbow cats...
- Kyokuho
